facts.summary: Ten global slash commands: docgen-analyze, docgen-audit, docgen-discover, docgen-doctor, docgen-fix, docgen-generate, docgen-init, docgen-plan, docgen-status, docgen-update.
README states the /docgen-* commands are wrappers around the global docgen orchestrator rather than standalone logic.
Command prompt bodies were not read; only filenames and the README wrapper description are confirmed.
